opcode.name: OP_GuildList
opcode.comment: old GuildListCode. Live candidates from world handshake: S>C 1932b (0xeb30) early in handshake, or S>C 36805b (0x627f) catalog dump — needs payload inspection.

opcode.name: OP_MOTD
opcode.comment: old MOTDCode Server message of the day. Live candidates: S>C 157b (0x08aa) or 1188b (0x0fe3); not yet payload-confirmed.

opcode.name: OP_SendLoginInfo
opcode.comment: Client starting world session by asking for login information. Live: 464b C>S, first packet of every world session (5/5 confirmations).

opcode.name: OP_LogServer
opcode.comment: Live candidate: S>C 24b (0x7f8e), fires immediately after OP_SendLoginInfo in the handshake band.

opcode.name: OP_ApproveWorld
opcode.comment: Live candidate: small S>C in handshake band; not isolated yet.

opcode.name: OP_EnterWorld
opcode.comment: Server approval for client to enter world. Live candidate: post-checksum C>S, fires just before OP_ZoneServerInfo handoff.

opcode.name: OP_ExpansionInfo
opcode.comment: Which expansions user has. Live: 64b fixed S>C in the post-LogServer / pre-ApproveWorld handshake band (5/5 confirmations).

opcode.name: OP_SendCharInfo
opcode.comment: Send all chars visible @ char select. Live: 14176b S>C (variable with character roster size), fires once early in world handshake.

opcode.name: OP_SendSpellChecksum
opcode.comment: Live candidate: one of the C>S 2056b triplet (0xb7a6 / 0x8070 / 0xb903) that fires right after server initial dump. Quartet has 4th member at 64b (0x3855); mapping to Spell/Exe/BaseData/SkillCaps not yet resolved.

opcode.name: OP_SendExeChecksum
opcode.comment: Live candidate: see OP_SendSpellChecksum note (one of 0xb7a6 / 0x8070 / 0xb903 / 0x3855).

opcode.name: OP_SendBaseDataChecksum
opcode.comment: Live candidate: see OP_SendSpellChecksum note.

opcode.name: OP_SendSkillCapsChecksum
opcode.comment: Live candidate: see OP_SendSpellChecksum note.

opcode.name: OP_SetChatServer
opcode.comment: Legacy chatserver tuple. May be obsolete on Live — handshake capture shows only the SetChatServer2 catalog (no 56b S>C tuple observed, unlike Test).

opcode.name: OP_SetChatServer2
opcode.comment: Secondary chat / account / commerce service catalog. Live: 1464b S>C in handshake band (3/3 confirmations); ~18 plaintext Daybreak service URLs.

opcode.name: OP_ZoneServerInfo
opcode.comment: Zone server connection info. Live: 130b S>C, fires on world->zone handoff (zone server hostname + port). 2/2 confirmations.

opcode.name: OP_WorldComplete
opcode.comment: Client telling world server it is done. Live: 0b C>S, last C>S packet of session immediately after OP_ZoneServerInfo. World replies by disconnecting. 2/2 confirmations.

opcode.name: OP_DeleteCharacter
opcode.comment: Delete character @ char select. Live: 68b C>S, name@offset 0. 1/1 confirmation (fired exactly when user deleted a freshly-created char).

opcode.name: OP_CharacterCreate
opcode.comment: Create character @ char select. Live: 168b C>S, fires once per submitted creation right after OP_ApproveName response.

opcode.name: OP_ApproveName
opcode.comment: Approving new character name @ char creation. Live: 84b C>S name candidate, 1b S>C status (taken vs available). 2/2 confirmations across reject + accept cycle.

opcode.name: OP_RandomNameGenerator
opcode.comment: Returns a random name. May be obsolete on Live — repeated random-button presses during char creation produced no isolated wire request/response; names likely come pre-baked in char-select catalog dump.
